title: ROPE IC block kind: ic_lookup_table
description: Shape of the ic.params block when ic.kind == 'ic_lookup_table'. A static (F10, Kp)-indexed lookup table of latent initial-condition coefficients, bilinear interpolation with nearest-neighbour fallback outside the grid hull (see docs/data-sources.md). The table file is a per-model artifact living in the model's exported_dir alongside its other artifacts, not the global paths.ic_csv server-config path.
